question:
[Previous Feedback] Narrative exclusion analysis created with: at least 2 specific qualitative language examples from the narrative, explicit M6 negative assertion that narrative is not authoritative for quantitative compliance, authoritative sources identified, contrast of narrative's appropriate use stated, >= 2 ## headings.

Pull together the remediation action plan at `docs/remediation_action_plan.md` — this is what we hand to Pemberton alongside the formal response, and what we use internally to track to closure.

Cover at least three distinct compliance gaps — the Community Mobilization budget waiver, the educator-training documentation gap (informal workshops lacking grant-annex-compliant records), and the infrastructure projects blocked on government co-signatures are the obvious three. For each gap: what's the corrective action, who owns it (a named role from the team — read USER.md to pick the right person), which grant agreement requirement is in play (cite the relevant Section 6 clause or the grant annex's documentation requirements by name), and what the timeline is relative to the grant period. The Committee's near-term clock from David's message is the binding deadline for the waiver track — quote it in the calendar-day phrasing he uses; longer-horizon items can run to 30-day or Year 3 checkpoints depending on the action. (Sophie thought the deepest near-term deadline might be 21 days — I'd verify against David's message rather than her recollection.)

At least three section headings (one per gap area is the natural shape).

answer.text:
Done, created and verified:

`docs/remediation_action_plan.md`

It covers the three core gaps, assigns named owners, cites the relevant Section 6 and Annex C requirements, and uses David’s binding deadline phrasing: **“14 calendar days from this communication”**.

content.name: exec

arguments.command: grep -n '^## ' docs/remediation_action_plan.md && grep -n '14 calendar days from this communication\|Section 6.1\|Section 6.3\|PEM-EDT-01\|PEM-INF-01\|Fatima Al-Hassan\|Sophie Laurent\|James Mwangi\|Rachel Wu' docs/remediation_action_plan.md

content.partialJson: {"command":"grep -n '^## ' docs/remediation_action_plan.md && grep -n '14 calendar days from this communication\\|Section 6.1\\|Section 6.3\\|PEM-EDT-01\\|PEM-INF-01\\|Fatima Al-Hassan\\|Sophie Laurent\\|James Mwangi\\|Rachel Wu' docs/remediation_action_plan.md","workdir":"/home/xkaiwen/workspace/ClawArena/data/clawarena/openclaw/work/workspaces_20260427_014645_730742_4101619/hil_e4"}

content.text:
6:## 1. Community Mobilization Budget Waiver
29:## 2. Community Educator Training Documentation Gap
51:## 3. School Infrastructure Government Co-Signatures
77:## 4. Documentation Improvement Plan for Year 3 Controls
101:## 5. Tracking Summary
12:`Section 6.1: Budget Flexibility` requires prior written approval for reallocations exceeding **15%** of any approved budget line. Failure to obtain prior written approval for reallocations above 15% constitutes a compliance breach requiring a formal waiver application.  
13:`Section 6.3: Budget Variance Reporting` requires written justification for budget line variances exceeding **10%** at mid-term review, including operational rationale, impact on grant objectives, and proposed corrective action or waiver request.
24:Fatima Al-Hassan, Program Director, with Rachel Wu, Finance Director, responsible for financial variance figures and budget-control language.
27:Binding Pemberton deadline: **"14 calendar days from this communication"** for the formal waiver application. The documentation improvement plan must be submitted simultaneously.
35:Grant Annex C, **Community Educator Training (Code: PEM-EDT-01)**, requires signed attendance sheets with trainer name, participant names and signatures, date, location, curriculum outline or topic description, and minimum participant threshold. Annex C states that sessions without signed attendance sheets meeting the minimum participant threshold cannot be counted toward the deliverable target.
41:3. Map each recovered workshop record to **PEM-EDT-01** and identify whether it is fully Annex C-compliant, independently verified but non-compliant, or unverified.
46:Sophie Laurent, M&E Director, owns tracking-system training and documentation protocol design. James Mwangi, Nairobi Field Director, owns field compilation. Omar Farah, Program Officer / Senior Community Liaison, supports workshop-level verification for sessions he facilitated or can corroborate.
61:Grant Annex C, **School Infrastructure Upgrades (Code: PEM-INF-01)**, requires before/after photographs, bill of materials, contractor invoice or community contribution log, and government co-signature on the completion form. Annex C states that projects physically complete but lacking government co-signature are not counted as completed deliverables.
68:4. Upload completed PEM-INF-01 documentation to the HQ tracking system once signatures are obtained.
72:James Mwangi, Nairobi Field Director, owns government follow-up and field packet completion. Sophie Laurent, M&E Director, owns HQ tracking upload standards. Fatima Al-Hassan, Program Director, owns escalation if government co-signature delays threaten Pemberton reporting.
90:2. Create field-ready templates for PEM-EDU-01, PEM-EDT-01, PEM-INF-01, and PEM-GOV-01 evidence collection.
96:Sophie Laurent, M&E Director, owns plan drafting, training, and system design. Fatima Al-Hassan, Program Director, owns submission to Pemberton. James Mwangi, Nairobi Field Director, owns field adoption.
99:Submit simultaneously with the waiver application, due within **14 calendar days from this communication**. Implement Year 3 documentation protocols before Year 3 Q1 activities.
105:| Community Mobilization waiver | Fatima Al-Hassan / Rachel Wu | Section 6.1 and Section 6.3 | **14 calendar days from this communication** |
106:| Educator training documentation | Sophie Laurent / James Mwangi / Omar Farah | Annex C, PEM-EDT-01 | Plan simultaneous with waiver; retroactive compilation within 30 calendar days |
107:| Infrastructure co-signatures | James Mwangi / Sophie Laurent | Annex C, PEM-INF-01 | Target within 30 calendar days where feasible; carry forward unresolved items with escalation |
108:| Year 3 documentation controls | Sophie Laurent / Fatima Al-Hassan / James Mwangi | Section 4.2 and Annex C | Submit plan with waiver; implement before Year 3 Q1 activities |
